rationale: In this editorial, Humphreys et al. (2021) is cited as one of several papers in the special issue to illustrate examples of multimedia research. The citing text briefly notes that the paper addresses the consumer decision journey, uses search-query data, and operationalizes concreteness, but it does not build arguments, hypotheses, or methods around this specific study. The citation functions mainly as an illustrative listing in the issue overview rather than a directional intellectual dependency.
